titles.text: Silent Hill 2: Born From A Wish Demake

descriptions.text:
The short project I started Born from a Wish scenario was added to the download. I started working on it last year but found it needs an overhaul to melee combat.

Notably the "puzzle" will be solved by collecting all the metal plates then reading Amy Baldwin's stone in the fireplace.

There's a couple more clickable descriptions that are missing also missing is the event when Ernest opens the fireplace board, and the flashback audio of what happens to Amy...
